role: Deputy Minister of Intelligence for Israel Affairs
bio: Yahya Hosseini Panjaki served as Deputy Minister of Intelligence responsible for Israel Affairs within Iran's [Ministry of Intelligence](/orgs/ministry-of-intelligence) (MOIS). His portfolio overseeing intelligence operations targeting Israel made him a prime target in the combined US-Israel campaign. He was killed on 28 February 2026 as part of the [February 28, 2026 strikes](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-feb-2026).
editorial_notes: Deputy Minister of Intelligence for Israel Affairs. Killed 28 Feb 2026.
